## Summary

- **What**: Describe the change in one sentence.
- **Why**: Motivation and context.

## Checklist
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated (logic: C0/C1 coverage as required)
- [ ] E2E visual tests / screenshots attached for UI changes
- [ ] CI passes (unit + e2e)
- [ ] Docs updated if needed

## Screenshot(s)
Attach before/after screenshots for UI changes.
